---
title: Trends in NO$_x$ and NO$_2$ emissions from road traffic in Great Britain
date: '2012-01-01'
author:
- S.D. Beevers
- E. Westmoreland
- M.C. de Jong
- M.L. Williams
- D.C. Carslaw
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Trends in NO$_x$ and NO$_2$ emissions from road traffic in Great Britain

<p class="pub-meta">S.D. Beevers, E. Westmoreland, M.C. de Jong, M.L. Williams, D.C. Carslaw</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2012


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2012-d.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
